name: meeting-superlab
description: A step-by-step product-design exploration workflow for Tencent Meeting teams: ask clarifying questions, present 2-3 options with tradeoffs, frame needs, research competitors, synthesize insights, explore solutions, prepare low-fidelity demos, hand off to Figma, and run multi-perspective reviews.

interface.shortDescription: AI workflows for Tencent Meeting product and design exploration
interface.longDescription: Meeting Superlab helps product managers and designers turn rough meeting-product needs into clarified problem frames, competitor-informed insights, solution directions, low-fidelity demo prompts, Figma handoff instructions, and structured review material. It proceeds step by step, asks targeted clarification questions before making assumptions, presents 2-3 options with pros and cons at decision points, and is inspired by Superpowers but optimized for product-design exploration rather than engineering delivery.
defaultPrompt: Use Meeting Superlab to explore this meeting product need.
Research competitors and turn this idea into solution directions.
Prepare a low-fidelity demo prompt and review checklist.
